name: Arshworth
description: Small town in the North Continental Union and birthplace of Dr. James Abner Tan.

name: North Continental Union
description: Political state associated with Arshworth and President Adam McCarthy.

name: Old NET
description: The pre-Renewal digital world where Twins, ghosts, ideologies, and human profiles became indistinguishable enough to trigger institutional collapse.
sourceReference: source-story.docx: Tan testimony and McCarthy letter

name: Shadow NET
description: A hidden network prepared by McCarthy where people from the new NET would be monitored and protected by Necro-agents.

name: Interstellar Space
description: Region where Voyager 1 detected another Voyager 1 containing encrypted historical files.
